name: A Pervert's Plan - TGTF / Gender Transformation
description:
(CW: Gender Transformation, sexual orientation change: Het male > Het female)
When an unlucky encounter with Teresa Gardens Community College's resident bonehead Jack results in a fabulous transformation for you, you'll find your preferences in a partner have taken a turn as well...
Jack wants you- as his new girlfriend- to come to the dance with him!

But although your sexual preferences have changed, nothing about your personality has.
So, will you go with him? Or dump the perv like a sack of rotten potatoes?
Much to Jack's potential dismay, the choice remains yours.
creator: Orbital_Lithium
